# US Address Generator

> Free browser-based random address generator for US state and international test data.
> Built for software testing, QA, form-validation demos, seed records, and placeholder data.
> Not for fraud, identity claims, account abuse, or rule evasion.

## Key facts

- Canonical URL: https://usaddregen.com/
- Languages: English (default), Simplified Chinese (zh-CN), Traditional Chinese (zh-TW).
- No backend API: generation runs in the browser over static datasets.
- Output fields: full name, street address, city, state/region, postal or ZIP code, phone number.
- Compliance: synthetic, realistic-format only; not deliverable; will fail real USPS/AVS/bank/shipping verification.

## US state address generators

- [Alabama (AL) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/alabama/): 4% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 35, 36; area codes 205, 251, 256, 334, 938; sample cities Birmingham, Montgomery, Huntsville.
- [Alaska (AK) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/alaska/): 0% statewide sales tax; ZIP prefixes 99; area codes 907; sample cities Anchorage, Fairbanks, Juneau, Sitka, Ketchikan.
- [Arizona (AZ) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/arizona/): 5.6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 85, 86; area codes 480, 520, 602, 623, 928; sample cities Phoenix, Tucson, Mesa.
- [Arkansas (AR) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/arkansas/): 6.5% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 71, 72; area codes 327, 479, 501, 870; sample cities Little Rock, Fayetteville, Fort Smith.
- [California (CA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/california/): 7.25% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 90, 91, 92, 93, 94, 95, 96; area codes 209, 213, 310, 323, 408, 415, 510, 530, 559, 619, 626, 650, 661, 707, 714, 760, 805, 818, 831, 858, 909, 916, 925, 949, 951; sample cities Los Angeles, San Diego, San Jose.
- [Colorado (CO) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/colorado/): 2.9% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 80, 81; area codes 303, 719, 720, 970; sample cities Denver, Colorado Springs, Aurora.
- [Connecticut (CT) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/connecticut/): 6.35% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 06; area codes 203, 475, 860, 959; sample cities Bridgeport, Stamford, New Haven.
- [Delaware (DE) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/delaware/): 0% statewide sales tax; ZIP prefixes 19; area codes 302; sample cities Wilmington, Dover, Newark, Middletown, Lewes.
- [Florida (FL) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/florida/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 32, 33, 34; area codes 239, 305, 321, 352, 386, 407, 561, 727, 754, 772, 786, 813, 850, 863, 904, 941, 954; sample cities Jacksonville, Miami, Tampa.
- [Georgia (GA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/georgia/): 4% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 30, 31, 398, 399; area codes 229, 404, 470, 478, 678, 706, 762, 770, 912; sample cities Atlanta, Augusta, Columbus.
- [Hawaii (HI) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/hawaii/): 4% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 967, 968; area codes 808; sample cities Honolulu, Hilo, Kailua.
- [Idaho (ID) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/idaho/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 83; area codes 208, 986; sample cities Boise, Meridian, Nampa.
- [Illinois (IL) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/illinois/): 6.25% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 60, 61, 62; area codes 217, 224, 309, 312, 331, 447, 464, 618, 630, 708, 773, 779, 815, 847, 872; sample cities Chicago, Aurora, Naperville.
- [Indiana (IN) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/indiana/): 7% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 46, 47; area codes 219, 260, 317, 463, 574, 765, 812, 930; sample cities Indianapolis, Fort Wayne, Evansville.
- [Iowa (IA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/iowa/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 50, 51, 52; area codes 319, 515, 563, 641, 712; sample cities Des Moines, Cedar Rapids, Davenport.
- [Kansas (KS) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/kansas/): 6.5% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 66, 67; area codes 316, 620, 785, 913; sample cities Wichita, Overland Park, Kansas City.
- [Kentucky (KY) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/kentucky/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 40, 41, 42; area codes 270, 364, 502, 606, 859; sample cities Louisville, Lexington, Bowling Green.
- [Louisiana (LA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/louisiana/): 5% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 70, 71; area codes 225, 318, 337, 504, 985; sample cities New Orleans, Baton Rouge, Shreveport.
- [Maine (ME) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/maine/): 5.5% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 039, 04; area codes 207; sample cities Portland, Lewiston, Bangor.
- [Maryland (MD) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/maryland/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 20, 21; area codes 227, 240, 301, 410, 443, 667; sample cities Baltimore, Frederick, Rockville.
- [Massachusetts (MA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/massachusetts/): 6.25% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 01, 02; area codes 339, 351, 413, 508, 617, 774, 781, 857, 978; sample cities Boston, Worcester, Springfield.
- [Michigan (MI) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/michigan/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 48, 49; area codes 231, 248, 269, 313, 517, 586, 616, 734, 810, 906, 947, 989; sample cities Detroit, Grand Rapids, Warren.

- [Missouri (MO) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/missouri/): 4.225% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 63, 64, 65; area codes 314, 417, 557, 573, 636, 660, 816; sample cities Kansas City, St. Louis, Springfield.
- [Montana (MT) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/montana/): 0% statewide sales tax; ZIP prefixes 59; area codes 406; sample cities Billings, Missoula, Bozeman, Helena, Great Falls.
- [Nebraska (NE) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/nebraska/): 5.5% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 68, 69; area codes 308, 402, 531; sample cities Omaha, Lincoln, Bellevue.
- [Nevada (NV) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/nevada/): 6.85% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 89; area codes 702, 725, 775; sample cities Las Vegas, Henderson, Reno.
- [New Hampshire (NH) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/new-hampshire/): 0% statewide sales tax; ZIP prefixes 03; area codes 603; sample cities Manchester, Nashua, Concord, Portsmouth, Dover.
- [New Jersey (NJ) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/new-jersey/): 6.625% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 07, 08; area codes 201, 551, 609, 640, 732, 848, 856, 862, 908, 973; sample cities Newark, Jersey City, Paterson.
- [New Mexico (NM) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/new-mexico/): 4.875% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 87, 88; area codes 505, 575; sample cities Albuquerque, Las Cruces, Rio Rancho.
- [New York (NY) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/new-york/): 4% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 10, 11, 12, 13, 14; area codes 212, 315, 332, 347, 516, 518, 585, 607, 631, 646, 680, 716, 718, 845, 914, 917, 929, 934; sample cities New York, Buffalo, Rochester.

- [North Dakota (ND) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/north-dakota/): 5% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 58; area codes 701; sample cities Fargo, Bismarck, Grand Forks.
- [Ohio (OH) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/ohio/): 5.75% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 43, 44, 45; area codes 216, 220, 234, 283, 326, 330, 380, 419, 440, 513, 567, 614, 740, 937; sample cities Columbus, Cleveland, Cincinnati.

- [Oregon (OR) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/oregon/): 0% statewide sales tax; ZIP prefixes 97; area codes 458, 503, 541, 971; sample cities Portland, Salem, Eugene, Bend, Medford.
- [Pennsylvania (PA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/pennsylvania/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 15, 16, 17, 18, 19; area codes 215, 223, 267, 272, 412, 445, 484, 570, 610, 717, 724, 814, 878; sample cities Philadelphia, Pittsburgh, Allentown.
- [Rhode Island (RI) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/rhode-island/): 7% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 028, 029; area codes 401; sample cities Providence, Warwick, Cranston.
- [South Carolina (SC) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/south-carolina/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 29; area codes 803, 839, 843, 854, 864; sample cities Charleston, Columbia, North Charleston.
- [South Dakota (SD) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/south-dakota/): 4.2% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 57; area codes 605; sample cities Sioux Falls, Rapid City, Aberdeen.
- [Tennessee (TN) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/tennessee/): 7% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 37, 38; area codes 423, 615, 629, 731, 865, 901, 931; sample cities Nashville, Memphis, Knoxville.
- [Texas (TX) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/texas/): 6.25% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 75, 76, 77, 78, 79; area codes 210, 214, 254, 281, 325, 346, 361, 409, 430, 432, 469, 512, 682, 713, 726, 737, 806, 817, 830, 832, 903, 915, 936, 940, 956, 972, 979; sample cities Houston, San Antonio, Dallas.
- [Utah (UT) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/utah/): 4.85% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 84; area codes 385, 435, 801; sample cities Salt Lake City, West Valley City, Provo.
- [Vermont (VT) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/vermont/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 05; area codes 802; sample cities Burlington, South Burlington, Rutland.
- [Virginia (VA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/virginia/): 4.3% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 22, 23, 24; area codes 276, 434, 540, 571, 703, 757, 804, 826, 948; sample cities Virginia Beach, Chesapeake, Norfolk.
- [Washington (WA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/washington/): 6.5% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 98, 99; area codes 206, 253, 360, 425, 509, 564; sample cities Seattle, Spokane, Tacoma.
- [West Virginia (WV) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/west-virginia/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 247, 248, 249, 25, 26; area codes 304, 681; sample cities Charleston, Huntington, Morgantown.
- [Wisconsin (WI) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/wisconsin/): 5% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 53, 54; area codes 262, 274, 414, 534, 608, 715, 920; sample cities Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay.
- [Wyoming (WY) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/wyoming/): 4% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 82, 83; area codes 307; sample cities Cheyenne, Casper, Laramie.

## Source notes

- USPS ZIP Code Lookup / Postal Explorer; lastVerified 2026-06-29
- NANPA area-code maps; lastVerified 2026-06-29
- Sales Tax Institute state-level rate chart, compiled from state Department of Revenue materials and rate providers; lastVerified 2026-06-29
- USPS ZIP Code Lookup plus major-city population ordering; lastVerified 2026-06-29

## International generators

- Nigeria address generator: Lagos, Ikeja, Abuja, Kano, Port Harcourt, Ibadan; +234 phone format.
- Egypt address generator: Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, Luxor, Mansoura; +20 phone format.
- Turkey address generator: Istanbul, Ankara, Izmir, Antalya, Bursa; +90 phone format.
- Pakistan address generator: Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Peshawar; +92 phone format.

- [NOMAD states explained](https://usaddregen.com/blog/nomad-states-explained.html)
- [Privacy policy](https://usaddregen.com/privacy.html)
